title: A May Morning
content:
The sky is clear,
     The sun is bright;
    The cows are red,
     The sheep are white;
    Trees in the meadows
    Make happy shadows.

    Birds in the hedge
     Are perched and sing;
    Swallows and larks
     Are on the wing:
    Two merry cuckoos
    Are making echoes.

    Bird and the beast
     Have the dew yet;
    My road shines dry,
     Theirs bright and wet:
    Death gives no warning,
    On this May morning.

    I see no Christ
     Nailed on a tree,
    Dying for sin;
     No sin I see:
    No thoughts for sadness,
    All thoughts for gladness.
meaning:
"A May Morning" is a quintessential example of William Henry Davies's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
